results.rendered_html:
pūrvavat a.
1 Having something antecedent or a cause.
2 Relating to something preceding.
— n. One of the three kinds of anumāna, inference of the effect from the cause; i. e. inferring from the rising of clouds that rain will fall.
— ind. As before.
